signals.headline: ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January, Driving 7% Price Surge to ~$2,400 | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
ETH ETF Inflows Hit $275M in Strongest Week Since January, Driving 7% Price Surge to ~$2,400 | YES | HIGH**  
Ethereum ETFs recorded over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with a 7% ETH price climb to nearly $2,400 as of April 22 (9:15 a.m. ET), up $98 from yesterday.[1][2]

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY favorite after historic 96-point weekend** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][4][6

Cooper Flagg overtakes Kon Knueppel as ROY favorite after historic 96-point weekend** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][4][6]
